• First-Time Buyer Scheme: If you're eligible, there are specialized programs that might allow for a higher loan-to-value ratio (up to 90%), with generally lower arrangement fees (around CAD $800). These schemes often come with incentives that could reduce your overall borrowing costs. 

• Self-Employed Mortgage: If applicable, this is designed for those with non-traditional income streams. Although the arrangement fee is a bit higher (around CAD $1800), this solution offers flexible income assessments that might help in securing a better rate if your documentation fits the criteria.
